full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Selecting an appropriate CPU-feasible dataset for LCGMM reproduction.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What dataset with 3 classes and continuous features is good for testing GMM-based clustering with manifold regularisation on a CPU laptop?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested Wine, Iris, and Digits. I selected Wine as it has more features (13) than Iris (4) without being as large as Digits.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Loaded Wine dataset, confirmed shape (178,13), checked class balance — suitable for K=3 clustering.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding why StandardScaler is necessary before kNN graph construction.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Why is feature standardisation important before building a kNN graph for LCGMM?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that without standardisation, features with larger scales dominate the distance computation in the kNN graph.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Standard ML practice; confirmed by sklearn kneighbors_graph documentation.
